title: swords to blades
description:
Turns all swords into blades!

If you want more information on how I did it join the discord.
body:
Hello!

Today I'll show you one of my favorite overlays for sword PVP.

Let me explain what this texture pack does, it removes one layer of pixels from all swords and moves it down which creates a cool blade sword overlay which helps with visibility and at the same time looks _incredible!_

Hope you enjoy the pack, see you next time!
